blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,769 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 35°F.
